title: NoRefreshScrollServerList
description: When you reload the multiplayer screen, it doesn't take you back to the top; instead, it loads the part you're currently on.
body:
🚀 ScrollServerList (Minecraft 26.1.2)
Are you tired of your multiplayer server list jumping all the way back to the top every time you hit the "Refresh" button? 😫

If you have a massive list of saved servers, constantly losing your scroll position just to check the ping is an incredibly frustrating experience. 📉 ScrollServerList is a simple and straightforward utility mod that fixes this problem forever! 🛠️ When you click refresh, your screen will stay exactly where you left it. ✨

❓ Why do you need this version?
While similar mods existed for older versions like 1.21.11, the massive jump to Minecraft 26.1.2 completely broke them due to huge internal code changes and the removal of obfuscation. 💥 This mod has been built from the ground up and optimized specifically for the new Minecraft 26.1.2 engine, guaranteeing perfect stability on modern versions! ⚙️

✨ Key Features:
📌 Keeps your scroll position: No more scrolling down over and over again!

💻 100% Client-Side: You only need to install it on your computer. It works perfectly when joining any server! 🌍

⚡ Plug & Play: No complicated menus or configs. Just drop it into your mods folder and enjoy a much smoother UI instantly! 🎉
